name: hms-trading-platform
description: Hermes Trading Platform - AI-Powered Trading System with Phase 3 Part 2 Backend

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm run dev 2>/dev/null || node src/server.ts
scripts.dev:web: cd web && npm run dev 2>/dev/null || echo 'Web dev requires vite setup'
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm run build 2>/dev/null || tsc
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Web build requires vite setup'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend || echo 'Tests not configured'
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && npm run test 2>/dev/null || echo 'Backend tests not configured'

author: Aurigraph DLT Corp
